texto: I don't feel as strong today as I do on other days, but I know Your strength will prevail in my weakness. The enemy is always trying to fill me with fear and doubt and make me abandon this mission. Help me ignore the lies and have courage to go on each day
explicacao: Citação de Molly Evangeline sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't feel as strong today as I do on other days, but I know Your strength will prevail in my w…” articula coragem, faith, fear em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como faith e fear.
